# CatInsurance.co.nz — NZ Cat Insurance Comparison
# Last updated: 2026-05-14

## About
CatInsurance.co.nz is New Zealand's independent cat insurance comparison and information service. We compare the six main NZ cat insurance providers and provide guidance to help cat owners find the right cover for their cats.

## Purpose
- Compare NZ cat insurance providers side by side — price, cover, claims and features
- Provide breed-specific insurance guidance for 12 popular cat breeds
- Explain coverage types, policy terms and claims processes
- Help cat owners understand costs, exclusions and how to choose the right policy

## Key Facts About NZ Cat Insurance (2026)
- Only 1 in 10 NZ cat owners have cat insurance (vs 1 in 5 dog owners)
- Cat insurance starts from $11/month (Southern Cross AcciPet, accident only)
- Comprehensive cat insurance costs $20–$65/month depending on age and breed
- 6 main providers: SPCA Pet Insurance, Southern Cross PetCare, Petcover, Cove, Pet-n-Sur, PD Insurance
- Maximum annual limit: $25,000 (SPCA Pet Insurance, Cove)
- Fastest claims: SPCA Pet Insurance (1–2 business days)
- Highest entry age: Pet-n-Sur (up to 11 years 11 months)
- Only 100% reimbursement with $0 excess: PD Insurance
- Hereditary conditions: covered by SPCA, Petcover, Cove, Pet-n-Sur, PD Insurance — NOT Southern Cross
- Annual vet cost inflation: 8–12% per year
- Emergency surgery costs: $2,500–$6,000; cancer treatment: $3,000–$15,000

## Provider Summary

### SPCA Pet Insurance
- Badge: Fastest Claims
- Monthly from: $20
- Annual limit: $25,000
- Claims turnaround: 1–2 business days (fastest available)
- Excess: $100 standard
- Unique: Covers non-chronic pre-existing conditions — only NZ insurer to do this
- Hereditary conditions: Yes
- URL: https://www.spca.nz/petinsurance

### Southern Cross PetCare (AcciPet)
- Badge: Most Affordable
- Monthly from: $11 (accident only)
- Annual limit: $10,000
- Claims turnaround: 5–10 business days
- Excess: $100
- Note: Does NOT cover hereditary conditions — not suitable for pedigree breeds
- Hereditary conditions: No
- URL: https://www.southerncross.co.nz/group/pet-insurance

### Petcover
- Badge: Best for Older Cats
- Monthly from: $19
- Annual limit: $15,000
- Claims turnaround: 3–5 business days
- Excess: $150
- Hereditary conditions: Yes
- URL: https://www.petcover.co.nz

### Cove Pet Insurance
- Badge: Most Flexible
- Monthly from: $22
- Annual limit: $25,000
- Claims turnaround: 2–4 business days
- Excess: Adjustable ($0–$500)
- Hereditary conditions: Yes
- URL: https://www.coveinsurance.co.nz

### Pet-n-Sur
- Badge: Best for Senior Cats
- Monthly from: $25
- Annual limit: $20,000
- Claims turnaround: 3–7 business days
- Entry age: Up to 11 years 11 months
- Hereditary conditions: Yes
- URL: https://www.petnnsur.co.nz

### PD Insurance
- Badge: Best Value
- Monthly from: $20
- Annual limit: $15,000
- Claims turnaround: 2–3 business days
- Excess: $0
- Co-pay: 0% (100% reimbursement)
- Hereditary conditions: Yes
- URL: https://www.pd.insurance

## Coverage Types Available

### Accident Only
- Covers: Road accidents, falls, injuries, swallowed objects, burns
- Does not cover: Illness, disease, hereditary conditions
- From: $11/month
- Best for: Healthy young cats on a tight budget
- URL: https://catinsurance.co.nz/types/accident-only

### Accident & Illness
- Covers: All accidents plus most illnesses including infections, digestive issues, cancer
- Does not cover: Wellness/routine care, pre-existing conditions (usually)
- From: $19/month
- Best for: Most cat owners — the most popular plan type
- URL: https://catinsurance.co.nz/types/accident-illness

### Comprehensive
- Covers: Accidents, illness, hereditary conditions, cancer, specialist referrals
- May include: Dental, some wellness
- From: $25/month
- Best for: Pedigree breeds or cats with high health risk profiles
- URL: https://catinsurance.co.nz/types/comprehensive

### Dental Care
- Covers: Dental procedures, extractions, dental disease treatment
- Usually an add-on to another policy
- From: $8/month extra
- URL: https://catinsurance.co.nz/types/dental-care

### Wellness Care
- Covers: Annual vaccinations, parasite treatment, check-ups, microchipping
- Routine care top-up — not medical insurance
- From: $10/month extra
- URL: https://catinsurance.co.nz/types/wellness-care

### Senior Cat Insurance
- Covers: Designed for cats 7+ years with chronic condition focus
- Key provider: Pet-n-Sur (accepts up to 11yr 11mo)
- From: $35/month
- URL: https://catinsurance.co.nz/types/senior-cat

## FAQs Overview
26 questions answered across 5 categories:
- General: How cat insurance works, who needs it, when to start
- Costs & Premiums: Pricing, excess, co-payments, how to save
- What's Covered: Inclusions, exclusions, fine print
- Providers: Comparing the six major insurers
- Claims: How to claim, turnaround times, declined claims
Full FAQ: https://catinsurance.co.nz/faqs

## Site Information
- Site: https://catinsurance.co.nz
- Operated by: Cover4You (cover4you.co.nz)
- Contact: hello@cover4you.co.nz
- Type: Independent comparison and information service
- Not a licensed financial adviser
- Referral fees may be received from insurers — does not affect independence
- Insurers referred are regulated under Insurance (Prudential Supervision) Act 2010
- Referred advisers registered under Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013
